serializableData.oldContent: ALL SYMBOLS PAY FROM LEFT TO RIGHT. BONUS PAYS ON ANY POSITION.
ALL SYMBOLS PAY FROM LEFT TO RIGHT. BONUS PAYS ON ANY POSITION.
Randomly, 1 or 2 hooks can appear at the end of a spin and pull the reels up to reveal WILD and MONEY symbols.
The RTP of the game when using the "ANTE BET" is {0}%
The player has the option to increase the bet multiplier to 18x bet per line. When playing with ante bet active, the chance to hit SCATTER symbols increases.
High volatility games pay out less often on average but the chance to hit big wins in a short time span is higher
All wins are multiplied by bet per line.
The FREE SPINS round can be instantly triggered from the base game by buying it for 100x current total bet.
The fish paying symbols are also MONEY symbols. At every spin, the fish take a random money value which can be won during the FREE SPINS feature.
After the third retrigger, the feature cannot be retriggered anymore.
Special reels are in play during the feature.
Hit 3, 4 or 5 SCATTER symbols anywhere on the screen to win 10, 15 or 20 free spins respectively.
All symbols pay from left to right on adjacent reels starting from the leftmost reel.
The player has the option to select the bet multiplier. Depending on the selected bet, the game behaves differently. The possible values are:
The maximum win amount is limited to {0}x bet. If the total win of a round reaches {1}x bet the round immediately ends, win is awarded and all remaining features are forfeited.
Whenever only 2 SCATTER symbols hit in the base game there is a chance that randomly a hook will appear and bring a third SCATTER into the screen to win the feature.
It appears on all reels during the FREE SPINS round.
Malfunction voids all pays and plays.
During the FREE SPINS feature each WILD symbol also collects all the values from MONEY symbols on the screen.
Bet multiplier 18x - the chance to win the respin round naturally is higher. More SCATTER symbols are present on the reels. The BUY FREE SPINS feature is disabled.
When winning on multiple paylines, all wins are added to the total win.
Randomly, when there are only 1 or 2 WILD symbols on the screen, at the end of a free spin, fish MONEY symbols can appear in random positions.
SPACE and ENTER buttons on the keyboard can be used to start and stop the spin.
Only the highest win is paid per line.
Substitutes for all symbols except SCATTER.
At every spin the MONEY symbol, takes a random money value from the following: 2x, 5x, 10x, 15x, 20x, 25x, 50x or 4000x total bet.
When buying the FREE SPINS round, on the triggering spin 3, 4 or 5 SCATTERS can hit randomly.
All symbols pay from left to right on selected paylines.
The theoretical RTP of this game is {0}%

Every 4th WILD symbol collected, retriggers the feature, awards 10 more free spins and the multiplier for MONEY symbol collection increases to 2x for the first retrigger, 3x for the second retrigger and 10x for the third retrigger.
The RTP of the game when using "BUY FREE SPINS" is {0}%
All values are expressed as actual wins in coins.
All the WILD symbols that hit during the feature are collected until the end of the round.
The retriggered spins are played after the previous batch of free spins ends. The multiplier applies to the retriggered spins.
BIG REELS AND COOL FISH WINS ALWAYS ON OFFER!

serializableData._text: 奖励按从左到右顺序支付。 Bonus在任何位置均赔付。
奖励按从左到右顺序支付。 Bonus在任何位置均赔付。
旋转结束时会随机出现1或2个鱼钩，它们会将转轴向上拉，从而显示WILD和现金符号。
使用“底注”时游戏的玩家回报率(RTP)为{0}%

玩家可以选择将赌注乘数增大到每条线18x赌注。
在游戏中投放底注后，出现SCATTER符号的几率会变大。
波动性较高的游戏通常较少赔付，但在短时间内赢取大奖的几率更高
它会出现在所有转轴上。
所有奖金乘以每条线的下注金额。
在基本游戏中以100x当前总赌注进行购买即可马上触发免费旋转回合。

大鱼赔付符号也是现金符号。每次旋转时，大鱼都会带有一个随机现金数值，
可在免费旋转功能期间赢取。
第三次重新触发后，功能将无法再次触发。
功能期间会出现特殊转轴。
在屏幕上任何位置出现3、4或5个SCATTER符号即可分别赢取10、15或20次免费旋转。
从最左侧的卷轴起临近卷轴上所有符号从左到右支付。
玩家可以选择赌注乘数。游戏可能会因所选的赌注而有所不同。可能的金额包括：
最大奖金金额限制为{0}x赌注。如果回合的总奖金达到{1}x赌注，则回合立即结束并派发奖金，同时所有剩余功能作废。
只要在基本游戏中仅出现2个SCATTER符号，即有机会随机出现一个鱼钩并为屏幕上带来第三个SCATTER，以便赢取功能。

它会在免费旋转回合期
间出现在所有转轴上。
系统故障期间所有游戏及赔付无效。
在免费旋转功能期间，每个WILD符号还会收集屏幕上现金符号的所有数值。
赌注乘数18x - 自然赢得重新旋转回合的机会更大。转轴上出现更多SCATTER符号。“购买免费旋转”功能已被禁用。
如果多条支付线上有赢奖，则所有赢奖都将加入到总赢奖中。
如果在免费旋转结束时屏幕上只有1个或2个WILD符号，大鱼现金符号会随机出现在任意位置。
键盘上的空格和回车按钮可用于开始和停止旋转。
每条派彩线上仅仅支付最高奖金。

每次旋转时，现金符号都会随机抽取如下的现金金额：
2x、5x、10x、15x、20x, 25x、50x或4000x总赌注。
购买免费旋转回合时，在触发旋转中会随机出现3、4或5个SCATTER。
所有符号在选中赔付线上从左到右赔付。

每集齐4个WILD符号即可重新触发功能，获得10次额外免费旋转，
而所收集现金符号的乘数会在首次重新触发时增大为2x，第二次重新触发时增大为3x，而第三次重新触发时增大为10x。
使用“购买免费旋转”时的游戏RTP为{0}%
赌注乘数12x - 普通游戏
所有数值表示为钱币的实际赢金
功能期间出现的所有WILD符号都会被收集直至回合结束。
重新触发的旋转在上一批免费旋转结束后进行。乘数适用于重新触发的旋转。
随时都有大转轴和炫酷大鱼奖金！
